content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s zero-training advantage while addressing its blind spot of overlooking alternative solution paths. This hybrid approach would enable LLMs to catch errors and improve outputs that a single consistent self-feedback loop would miss, without adding the overhead of supervised training or reinforcement learning.
